---
title: "ASM-TMC Blog"
description: "News, updates, and scientific highlights from the ASM-TMC Chapter"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [image, date, title, author, description, categories, reading-time]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
toc: false
comments: false
---

Stay up to date with chapter news, event recaps, scientific spotlights, and career advice from the ASM-TMC community.
